title: Copilot settings + UI
predecessor: M33-T6 shipped 2026-04-16, commit 3c00be7 (copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool; 7 files, +982/-31; 1082 → 1087 unit tests, 0 lint errors, 24 warnings steady, typecheck clean across 6 packages)
goal: Wire three clamped settings keys (copilot_enabled bool default true, copilot_interval_minutes 1-60 default 5, copilot_categories subset of 5 categories default all) + settings.getCopilot / setCopilot IPC channels + CopilotSection UI under Settings → Runtime (alongside agentic + planner sections from M31 T7 / M32 T7). setCopilot triggers copilotAnalyzerService.restart(companyId) so the scheduler picks up the new interval / enabled / categories without an app restart. Pattern mirror: M31 T7 agentic settings + M32 T7 planner settings — same clamp-at-read + test-via-mock plumbing with one new wrinkle (the categories subset needs a validator that the allowed set is non-empty and every value is in COPILOT_CATEGORIES). +7 unit tests (1087 → 1094).
acceptance: packages/shared-types/src/settings.ts extended with CopilotSettings interface (copilotEnabled: boolean, copilotIntervalMinutes: number, copilotCategories: CopilotCategory[]) and SettingsGetCopilotResult / SettingsSetCopilotArgs wire types matching the M31 / M32 settings channel shape.
settings repo clamp: copilot_interval_minutes clamped to [1, 60] at read + write; copilot_categories validated against COPILOT_CATEGORIES with empty-array guard (fallback to full set).
settings.getCopilot / setCopilot IPC channels + handlers + preload bridge; TeamXApi.settings.getCopilot / setCopilot methods.

composition root wires settingsRepo.getCopilot() into copilotAnalyzerService.restart(companyId) on setCopilot mutations (companyId threaded through the IPC arg so multi-company setups restart only the affected company's analyzer timer).

renderer — CopilotSection in SettingsView alongside RuntimeSection / PrivacySection / ConcurrencySection / AgenticSection / PlannerSection. Toggle for copilot_enabled; number input 1-60 for copilot_interval_minutes; category chips (5 checkboxes) for copilot_categories.

Unit tests +7 — settings-repo.test.ts: (1) getCopilot returns defaults when unset, (2) setCopilot clamps interval to [1,60], (3) setCopilot rejects empty categories (falls back to full set), (4) setCopilot filters unknown categories; settings-handlers.test.ts: (5) getCopilot round-trips through IPC, (6) setCopilot invokes analyzer.restart; copilot-analyzer-service.test.ts (or re-use existing restart test): (7) restart picks up new interval.
Lint clean (0 errors, ≤34 warnings). Typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages.
Atomic commit: feat(m33): M33 T7 — copilot settings + UI
Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T7 — commit ledger (<sha>)
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/handlers.ts (or settings-handlers.ts) — +getCopilot / setCopilot handlers with analyzer.restart side effect
notes: Pattern match: this task is directly parallel to M31 T7 (agentic settings) and M32 T7 (planner settings). Same clamp-at-read, same IPC channel shape, same SettingsSection UI layout. The new wrinkle is the categories subset — validate non-empty and every value in COPILOT_CATEGORIES; empty-array defaults to full set (conservative default; the user never gets a silently-disabled analyzer through a bad categories save).

Analyzer.restart side effect: the setCopilot handler MUST call copilotAnalyzerService.restart(companyId) synchronously after the settings write. This is how the scheduler picks up the new interval without an app restart. Mirror the M31 T7 pattern for agentic settings where setAgentic triggers a re-read at the next agentic-loop start (no restart needed there because budgets are per-run-read). Copilot's per-company timer means restart is necessary.

Estimate: 25-30 min. Small surface area compared to T6 (pure settings plumbing + one UI section). T8 (canned copilot provider seam) is next — full session with three-tier sentinel pattern, mirrors test-agentic-provider / test-classifier / test-agentic-tools structurally.
